So much has happened today. Feels like this is all a big dream.
Like I'll wake up and go back to sorting bookshelves anytime now.

to go all out with my magic, 
I... almost died multiple times.

I don't know what to think.

My memory is still foggy, and 
it seems like the state of this journal reflects that. 
Perhaps finding these missing pages will help refresh my 
memory... If they can even be found.
